calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Oct-01-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanetter Fisher-Kouadio for and with Vikki Robinson (Administrator).

Ms. Fisher-Kouadio addressed the Examiner's notes and explained the reason why the statutory fees and administratives fees were paid out of escrow. In addition, she stated she was unable to open the bank accounts due to Ms. Robinson's status with the bank. Ms. Fisher-Kouadio confirmed that she had signed the Inventory and Appraisals, the Amended Petition, and the Supplement to the Amended Petition. The Court informed Ms. Fisher-Kouadio that there was likely to be a surcharge as the explanation did not justify what took place, and that the manner in which things were done did not comport with the Probate Code. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Court Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: J. Alameda/R. Noguera.
